description: Editing-completeness campaign: the cheap gaps from docs/gaps.md — area/tag rename, tag re-parent + keyboard shortcut, URL append-/prepend-notes, move-to-inbox, duplicate (URL + AppleScript), project scheduling firm-up. All fresh entities are created in setup so seed records other probes rely on stay pristine.

probes.title: area rename via `set name of area` — standard setter, previously unprobed

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new area with properties {name:"E-AREA-RN"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMArea WHERE title='E-AREA-RN'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set name of area "E-AREA-RN" to "E-AREA-RN2"

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMArea WHERE title='E-AREA-RN2'

probes.title: tag rename via `set name of tag` — do existing assignments survive the rename?

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"E-TAG-RN"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTag WHERE title='E-TAG-RN'

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set tag names of to do id "{seed:LAB-INBOX-1}" to "E-TAG-RN"

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag t ON tt.tags=t.uuid WHERE t.title='E-TAG-RN' AND tt.tasks='{seed:LAB-INBOX-1}'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set name of tag "E-TAG-RN" to "E-TAG-RN2"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTaskTag tt JOIN TMTag t ON tt.tags=t.uuid WHERE t.title='E-TAG-RN2' AND tt.tasks='{seed:LAB-INBOX-1}'

probes.title: re-parent an EXISTING root tag via `set parent tag` (only creation-time parenting was validated, A05)

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"E-TAG-P"}
tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"E-TAG-C"}

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTag WHERE title='E-TAG-C' AND parent IS NULL

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set parent tag of tag "E-TAG-C" to tag "E-TAG-P"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTag c JOIN TMTag p ON c.parent=p.uuid WHERE c.title='E-TAG-C' AND p.title='E-TAG-P'

probes.title: URL append-notes — documented param, unprobed; separator behavior is the finding

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES' AND notes='BASE'

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES' AND notes LIKE 'BASE%TAIL'

probes.title: URL prepend-notes on the same item

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES' AND notes LIKE 'HEAD%BASE%TAIL'

probes.title: move a scheduled to-do back to the Inbox via AppleScript `move ... to list "Inbox"`

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-INBOXMV' AND start=1

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:E-INBOXMV}" to list "Inbox"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-INBOXMV' AND start=0

probes.title: URL duplicate=true on update — does the documented-ish duplicate param exist?

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-DUP'

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask GROUP BY title HAVING title='E-DUP' AND COUNT(*)=2

probes.title: AppleScript `duplicate to do` is REFUSED by the app: 'Selected to dos can not be copied. (-1717)' — the URL duplicate=true param (E07) is the only automation path

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-DUP2'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to duplicate to do id "{uuid:E-DUP2}"

probes.title: project scheduling firm-up: update-project when=<future date> (only completed=true was probed on projects, U08)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-PROJ-WHEN' AND type=1

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-PROJ-WHEN' AND start=2 AND startDate IS NOT NULL

probes.title: tag keyboard shortcut setter — does the sdef expose `keyboard shortcut` for tags? (pure discovery)

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set keyboard shortcut of tag "E-TAG-P" to "9"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTag WHERE title='E-TAG-P' AND shortcut IS NOT NULL

probes.title: append-notes to an EMPTY note — is the newline separator inserted anyway? (exact delta assertions need this pinned)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES2' AND notes=''

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES2' AND notes LIKE '%SOLO'

probes.title: prepend-notes to an EMPTY note — same separator edge from the other side

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES3' AND notes=''

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-NOTES3' AND notes LIKE 'SOLO2%'

probes.title: move a PROJECT to another area via `set area of project id` — no op exposes this today (agents can't reorganize projects)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-MVPROJ' AND type=1 AND area='{seed:LAB-AREA-A}'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set area of project id "{uuid:E-MVPROJ}" to area id "{seed:LAB-AREA-B}"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-MVPROJ' AND area='{seed:LAB-AREA-B}'

probes.title: RESTORE from Trash: does AppleScript `move ... to list "Inbox"` un-trash (the UI's Put Back)? No documented restore surface exists

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-RESTORE'

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to delete to do id "{uuid:E-RESTORE}"

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-RESTORE' AND trashed=1

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:E-RESTORE}" to list "Inbox"

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-RESTORE' AND trashed=0 AND start=0

probes.title: CONVERT to-do → project is IMPOSSIBLE via AppleScript: 'Can't get list \"Projects\"' — the Projects sidebar entry is not a scriptable list; no conversion surface exists. Regression lock.

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-CONVERT' AND type=0

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to move to do id "{uuid:E-CONVERT}" to list "Projects"

probes.title: duplicate a PROJECT: update-project?duplicate=true (E07 analog) — children copied too?

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-DUPPROJ' AND type=1

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE type=1 GROUP BY title HAVING title='E-DUPPROJ' AND COUNT(*)=2

probes.title: append-notes / prepend-notes on a PROJECT (E04/E05 probed to-dos only)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-PNOTES' AND notes='PBASE'

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-PNOTES' AND notes LIKE 'PBASE%PTAIL'
SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='E-PNOTES' AND notes LIKE 'PHEAD%PBASE%PTAIL'

probes.title: UN-NEST a tag to root is IMPOSSIBLE: 'Can't make missing value into type tag (-1700)' — the setter coerces; no nil accepted. Regression lock.

setup.osascript: tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"E-UNNEST-P"}
tell application "Things3" to make new tag with properties {name:"E-UNNEST-C"}
tell application "Things3" to set parent tag of tag "E-UNNEST-C" to tag "E-UNNEST-P"

setup.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTag c JOIN TMTag p ON c.parent=p.uuid WHERE c.title='E-UNNEST-C' AND p.title='E-UNNEST-P'

commands.osascript: tell application "Things3" to set parent tag of tag "E-UNNEST-C" to missing value

probes.title: duplicate=true on a REPEATING TEMPLATE does NOT duplicate — zero DB delta on the family, and the app opens NEW WINDOWS (tier 3). Clone-and-rename repeat creation is dead; regression lock.
